details.test: Task 1: One-time $75 Emergency Medical Fund donation (no newsletter)
Task 2: $25/month sponsorship for senior dog with special medical needs
Task 3: Add 3 different Food & Treats wishlist items ($10–$20) to cart
Task 4: $50 tribute donation in honor with scheduled e-card
Task 5: Register 2 attendees for free on-site tour (2026-07-15 10:00)
Task 6: Submit foster interest for quiet-home senior dog (3-month foster)
Task 7: Donate smallest suggested amount to campaign with smaller minimum
Task 8: Wishlist cart with 3 items, 5 units total, promo code FEED10 and checkout
Task 9: Newsletter signup (Rescue Stories + Volunteer Opportunities, monthly, no urgent alerts)
